title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su argues that perfecting prompts is less valuable than context engineering. He explains three related concepts: grounding anchors AI responses to provided documents, RAG retrieves sources before generating answers, and context engineering assembles all necessary inputs rather than optimizing wording alone.
